original_image_tags: A rectangular, black ink stamp is in the lower right corner. The stamp reads: "FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION / U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE / SEP 12 1947". Below the date, the fields "SAN FRANCISCO" (likely) and "FILE" are visible.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned black-and-white photocopy of a typed government memorandum cover sheet marked “CONFIDENTIAL,” with a handwritten signature near the middle-right and a rectangular date stamp at the lower right reading “SEP 12 1947.”*
